channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Abhishek Banerjee Responds to Kolkata Civic Property Notices, Vows Legal Fight
item.description: In a recent development in West Bengal politics, Trinamool Congress MP Abhishek Banerjee has publicly stated that he will continue his political battle against the BJP despite Kolkata municipal author...

item.title: Geraldine Fitzgerald: Celebrating the Legacy of a Pioneering Irish Actress
item.description: Geraldine Fitzgerald was a celebrated Irish actress whose talent and emotional depth left an indelible mark on Hollywood's Golden Age. Best known for her unforgettable portrayal of Isabella Linton in ...

item.title: Gene Laurents: Iconic 1960s Fashion Photography for Vogue and Harper’s Bazaar
item.description: Gene Laurents was an American photographer celebrated for his elegant and cinematic style in mid-20th century fashion photography. Active primarily in the 1950s and 1960s, he contributed extensively t...

item.title: TV presenter recounts financial and emotional abuse by ex-husband
item.description: Ruth Dodsworth, known for presenting the weather on ITV Wales, has spoken about the severe coercive and controlling behaviour she endured from her former husband, Jonathan Wignall, who was jailed in 2...

item.title: Peter Obi Cleared To Contest NDC Presidential Primary For 2027
item.description: Peter Obi, wey formerly dey Labour Party, don officially get clearance to contest for Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) presidential primary ahead of 2027 general election. The screening take place fo...

item.title: The NaNaz: Over-50s Punk Band Making Their Voice Heard on Social Issues
item.description: The NaNaz are a six-piece punk band from south Wales, formed by women in their 50s and 60s, who channel their life experiences into music. Born from the Nana Punk workshops at Newport's Cab club, the ...

item.title: Cubana Chief Priest Says Tinubu Remains Wary Due to His Past Support for Peter Obi
item.description: Cubana Chief Priest, the popular socialite and businessman whose real name na Pascal Okechukwu, don talk say President Bola Tinubu no too trust am well-well because of how e take support Peter Obi for...

item.title: EU Reaches Deal to Activate US Trade Agreement Following Negotiations and Tariff Pressures
item.description: The European Union has finally agreed to implement the trade pact wey dem strike with the United States last July. This one come after plenty pressure from President Donald Trump, who threaten to slap...

item.title: Indian PM Modi Meets Italian PM Meloni in Rome to Discuss Trade and Bilateral Ties
item.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi visited Rome for a historic bilateral meeting with Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, marking the first official visit by an Indian PM to Italy in 26 years. Dur...

item.title: European Stock Markets Slightly Decline Amid Ongoing Middle East Tensions
item.description: European stock markets experienced a slight decline on May 20, 2026, as ongoing tensions in the Middle East continued to create uncertainty among investors. In London, the FTSE index fell by 0.41%, co...

item.title: Retired Teacher Loses Sh46 Million in ATM Scam and Faces Investigation Costs
item.description: Ms Magreth Jacob, a retired teacher from Babati in Manyara Region, has suffered a huge financial loss of Sh46 million after her ATM card was allegedly swallowed by a machine on Election Day, October 2...

item.title: 1954 Jaguar XK120 SE Drophead Coupe: Features and History of the Special Equipment Model

item.title: Tanzania and Rwanda Strengthen Energy Ties with Joint Power and Gas Projects
item.description: Tanzania and Rwanda have just signed a major bilateral energy cooperation deal on 19 May 2026 in Kigali, during the second Nuclear Energy Innovation Summit for Africa (NEISA 2026). The agreement, sign...

item.title: Floods in Davao City Force Hundreds to Evacuate, One Fatality Reported
item.description: Heavy rains caused by the easterlies and the Intertropical Convergence Zone (ITCZ) triggered severe flooding in several areas of Davao City starting Monday night, May 19, 2026. The floods resulted in ...

item.title: Super Eagles Drawn with Madagascar, Tanzania and Guinea-Bissau in AFCON 2027 Qualifiers
item.description: Nigeria football fans are buzzing after the AFCON 2027 qualifiers draw placed the Super Eagles in a group with Madagascar, Tanzania and Guinea-Bissau. The draw took place in Cairo at the Egyptian Foot...

item.description: Kim Novak, born on February 13, 1933, is an American retired actress and painter whose impact on cinema has been recognized with multiple awards, including two Golden Globes, a Golden Lion for Lifetim...

item.title: Senator Bill Cassidy Supports Resolution Limiting Presidential War Powers After Primary Loss
item.description: Senator Bill Cassidy (R-LA), following his defeat in the Republican primary influenced by President Donald Trump, has taken a notable political stance by voting with Democrats to advance a resolution ...

item.title: How Better Eye Care and Glasses Improve Productivity for Kenya’s Tea Farmers and Workers
item.description: As Kenya marks International Tea Day on 21st May, one big issue affecting our tea sector is poor eyesight among farmers and factory workers. Kenya is one of the top tea producers globally and the larg...
